title: hyptis pusilla
intro: Hyptis pusilla, also known as Small Hyptis or Small Bush Mint, is a perennial herb native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hyptis pusilla include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
